# orientation

**Instance Property**

The image orientation of the Live Photo.

## Declaration

```swift
var orientation: CGImagePropertyOrientation { get }
```

## Discussion

This [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHLivePhotoEditingContext/fullSizeImage] object does not reflect the Live Photo’s orientation metadata. Use this property when displaying that image to ensure that it appears to the user in the correct orientation.

## Examining an Editing Context’s Live Photo

- **fullSizeImage**: The unedited still photo content of the Live Photo.
- **duration**: The duration, in seconds, of the Live Photo.
- **photoTime**: The offset, in seconds, from the beginning of the Live Photo’s duration to the time corresponding to its still photo.
